title: Comparative transcriptome analysis of two closely related begonia species
author: Emelianova, Katie
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Emelianova, Katie, Kidner, Catherine (2022): COMPARATIVE TRANSCRIPTOME ANALYSIS OF TWO CLOSELY RELATED BEGONIA SPECIES REVEALS DIVERGENT PATTERNS IN KEY LIGHT-REGULATED PATHWAYS. Edinburgh Journal of Botany 79 (398): 1-18, DOI: 10.24823/EJB.2022.398, URL: http://dx.doi.org/10.24823/ejb.2022.398
